rationale: All required content is present and correct: 'Dr. Maya Chen' bold white over 'Climate Scientist, NOAA' in muted gray, a teal vertical accent bar, positioned lower-left near the specified safe area, on the dark background; the 0% still is an empty hold and the 100% still is empty again, matching the in/hold/out beats. The filmstrip shows a coherent staggered entrance (tile 2 shows the accent bar alone before the text arrives), a long clean hold, and the final still confirms a completed exit. Motion loses a point because the second-to-last and last strip tiles (~4.4s+) still read as fully opaque, suggesting the 4.2s exit starts late or very abruptly, and the eases can only be partially verified. Typography, hierarchy, and spacing are tight and broadcast-plausible with nothing clipped or overlapping; one quick pass on exit timing and it ships.
